notes:
nghĩa phụ = godfather; a man who acts as a second father, often in a formal or traditional sense.  

It’s a noun. You can say một người nghĩa phụ, nghĩa phụ của ai. Often used with verbs like nhận làm nghĩa phụ (to become someone’s godfather) or coi như nghĩa phụ (to treat as a godfather).  

This word sounds formal or old-fashioned. In daily life, people more often say cha đỡ đầu (same meaning, easier to remember).  

Related word: nghĩa mẫu = godmother.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always considers his godfather as his second father.
When I was young, my godfather took me to the park every weekend.
She is very grateful to her godfather for helping the family during difficult times.
exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn xem nghĩa phụ như người cha thứ hai của mình.
Ngày nhỏ, em được nghĩa phụ dẫn đi chơi công viên mỗi cuối tuần.
Chị rất biết ơn nghĩa phụ vì đã giúp đỡ gia đình trong lúc khó khăn.
notes_md:
**nghĩa phụ** = godfather; a man who acts as a second father, often in a formal or traditional sense.  

It’s a noun. You can say *một người nghĩa phụ*, *nghĩa phụ của ai*. Often used with verbs like *nhận làm nghĩa phụ* (to become someone’s godfather) or *coi như nghĩa phụ* (to treat as a godfather).  

This word sounds formal or old-fashioned. In daily life, people more often say **cha đỡ đầu** (same meaning, easier to remember).  

Related word: **nghĩa mẫu** = godmother.
